title: Build nixtla-release-validation workflow
description: Create first production test harness workflow for nixtla. Location: 002-workspaces/test-harness-lab/skills/nixtla-release-validation/. Follow pattern from reference-implementation/. Create 5 phases: (1) git diff analysis, (2) test impact prediction, (3) risk assessment, (4) pytest verification with compare vs predictions, (5) go/no-go recommendation. Write verification script: scripts/analyze_test_results.sh. Test with last release (v1.6.0 → v1.7.0). See docs/NIXTLA-APPLICATIONS.md for complete specification.

title: Create optional test-harness reference docs (2,3,5)
description: Create remaining reference docs for test-harness-lab (optional - nice to have). Files: reference-implementation/references/02-phase-2.md (field utilization procedure), 03-phase-3.md (impact assessment procedure), 05-phase-5.md (final synthesis procedure). Follow pattern from 01-phase-1.md and 04-verify-with-script.md. These are P4 because phases 1 and 4 are the critical references - users can adapt the pattern for phases 2, 3, 5.

title: Fix test-harness reference script empty array bug
description: The analyze_field_utilization.sh script in 002-workspaces/test-harness-lab/reference-implementation/scripts/ has a bug where lines 177-179 attempt to use array expansion before checking if arrays are empty. With 'set -u' this causes unbound variable errors. Move array-to-JSON conversion inside the conditional blocks (lines 182-192) or add array length checks before printf. This is a P3 since it's educational reference code - users can fix or write their own scripts.
